metadata.title: Turning a 2v1 on Split with Calm Aim and Smart Moves
metadata.description:
Check out this clutch 2v1 on Split where timing and positioning make all the difference. Watch the smooth peeks and clean shots that seal the round. What’s your favorite spot to hold on Split?

Drop your best clutch moments in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #clutch #fps
